title: OASA Chat Completion Request
description: Extends the standard OpenAI chat completion request with OASA compliance fields. This schema validates the JSON body sent to /v1/chat/completions on a Sovereign Node.

model.description: Model identifier. Should reference a locally deployed, quantized model.

oasa_compliance_lock.description: REQUIRED. The OASA-Lock 'poison pill'. When true, the proxy enforces all OASA axioms for this request. If the local AI engine fails, the proxy MUST return 503 Service Unavailable instead of falling back to any external API (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.). This prevents accidental exfiltration of prompts, embeddings, and confidential data. For STRICT compliance, this field must always be true.

oasa_audit_tag.description: Optional tag written to the audit log alongside this request. Useful for compliance tracing (e.g., ticket IDs, department codes).

oasa_jurisdiction.description: Override the default jurisdiction for this request. The proxy will route only to nodes within the specified jurisdiction.
